listServices.title: Turnkey web development

icon.alt: Icon for the turnkey web development service

listServices.description: Turnkey web development — is a full cycle of creating a web solution: from task analysis and interface design to development, testing, security settings, hosting and preparation for attracting traffic. Your time is spent on business, not on managing contractors.

listServices.title: Technical support and maintenance
list: Revision of projects, elimination of errors

icon.alt: Website Technical support and maintenance icon

image.alt: Website Technical support and Maintenance image

listServices.description: Technical support and maintenance — is the regular maintenance of web projects: stability monitoring, troubleshooting, dependency updates, and trouble—free operation. In a word, everything so that you can focus on your business, and not on incidents.

listServices.title: Digital Marketing & Growth
listServices.description: Marketing and promotion — is a comprehensive development of the visibility and attractiveness of a project in a digital environment. Technical and content preparation of the website for correct indexing and ranking in search engines, implementation of accounting systems, advertising settings and much more.

pricesList.title: Technical partnership
pricesList.descriptionFirst: The cost is calculated based on the time spent — you only pay for real work, without hidden fees.
pricesList.descriptionSecond: You will receive prompt error correction, optimization, infrastructure configuration, security, consultations and similar work — all within the hourly rate.
pricesList.ps: You can take a fixed number of hours, or after voicing the problem, I will give my estimate of the time.

pricesList.title: Web development
pricesList.descriptionFirst: Fixed price is determined after the approval of the project brief. You know the budget and deadlines in advance — without hidden fees.
pricesList.descriptionSecond: You get not just a website, but a technical partner for the entire life of the project: support, optimization, integration, advertising, analytics — all within the tariff (surcharges only for global changes after completion).
pricesList.ps: The clearer your technical specification, the faster and more profitable the start. Don't know what you want? I'll help you formulate your goals together.

pricesList.price: 10% of your ad spend, or from 2 000₽/service
pricesList.title: Attracting traffic
pricesList.descriptionFirst: The cost is 10% of the advertising budget or a fixed price starting from 2 000 RUB for a separate service. You can see in advance what you are paying for — without hidden surcharges.
pricesList.descriptionSecond: You get not just a performer, but a marketing partner: setting up analytics, SEO, integration, launching and scaling advertising — all for your business (additional payments only for non-standard tasks agreed separately).
pricesList.ps: The clearer your goals are, the more accurate the result. Not sure where to start? I'll help you create a strategy — without unnecessary expenses.

popUpWindow.title: To move forward or dive deeper into the details, please contact me in a way that is convenient for you.
popUpWindow.alt: Hands connecting puzzle pieces — symbol of partnership
